changes.reason: Activate the dormant charm-wall pin-avoid concept only inside the VALID_0DTE router, preserving all existing productive valid-0DTE profiles and avoiding any missing/stale 0DTE option-confirmed behavior change.

Run a pure attribution probe for the existing dormant pin-avoid playbook logic. Current tail risk clusters in charm/pin profiles, especially charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE -513.4 and charm_wall_breakaway_long average MAE -213.3, while broad filters remove too much protected PnL.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should reveal whether the existing pin-avoid profile can absorb or reclassify tail-heavy charm/pin states without tightening global vetoes or damaging the pullback/squeeze/1DTE engines. Main tradeoff is cannibalization of profitable charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long flow; reject unless total net profit retains at least 98% of run_029, protected fast winners are preserved, and combined charm/pin MAE or attribution improves.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Use the strategist's Dormant Pin-Avoid Attribution Probe as one config-only strategy-profile family. The best-by-score base is already strong, and recent direct charm-wall geometry, 1DTE tightening, no-0DTE tightening, and broad hidden-signature pruning either hurt score or risk over-filtering. This activation is additive and diagnostic: it changes routing attribution for VALID_0DTE only, does not touch missing/stale fallback policy, and does not impose a global entry veto.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1325.1 over 34 VALID_0DTE trades with fast 3.8 minute median hold but owns the global -513.4 MAE. charm_wall_breakaway_long is profitable but tail-heavy, with 3 trades, $532.6 PnL, -346.8 worst MAE, and low 140.8 PnL/exposure in the latest run. Static filters overlap protected extended-VWAP winners, so router-level attribution is the cleaner next probe.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Attribution Probe
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize high-quality charm-pin/charm-wall winners without reducing MAE or exposure. Treat this as discovery, not promotion, unless standalone attribution is positive and portfolio score improves.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm/pin context where the existing playbook identifies pin-avoid risk that currently routes into charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, completed trades do not fall more than 10%, pnl_per_exposure_hour is flat or better, and protected fast/extended-VWAP winner retention remains >=95%.
